title: Sour Crispy Uruguayan Onion Stir-Fry
description: A brunch-mood dish featuring puff pastry and onions in a tangy sauce with a tadka flavoring for a kosher-friendly meal.
instructions: Slice onions thinly and jalepeño into small pieces.
Tear puff pastry into smaller pieces for easier handling.
Mix tomato sauce with kosher salt, chopped garlic, and turmeric powder in a bowl. Heat the mixture until it reaches 375°F (190°C).
Place onions on greased baking sheet, sprinkle evenly with paprika and cover with puff pastry pieces.
Bake for about 20 minutes or until puff pastry is golden brown and crispy.
Slice jalepeño into thin rings and place over onions. Brush each ring lightly with tomato sauce to enhance flavors and color.
Place tray back in oven and bake for another 5-7 minutes or until the sauce reaches a boil and caramelizes slightly.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course depending on your preference.
